message:
fix(consumer): cap decision_log to prevent unbounded memory growth

FabricConsumer::decision_log grew without bound for audit-backed
kernels since records were appended but never evicted. Add a
decision_log_capacity field (default 4096) and route all pushes
through push_decision() which evicts the oldest entry at capacity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
